text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, March 15. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Yum, that sounds delicious! Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
